rationale: Educ. Code §25.112 governs class-size limits and contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13. Any impact is indirect fiscal pressure on districts, not a textual conflict.
quote: Except as otherwise authorized by this section, a school district may not enroll more than 22 students in a prekindergarten, kindergarten, first, second, third, or fourth grade class.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Increasing the homestead exemption could indirectly reduce district revenue, potentially affecting compliance capacity, but §25.112 does not reference or depend on homestead exemption amounts.
